description: A color photograph of a man with short dark hair and a goatee, wearing a torn white 'Calvin Klein Jeans' long-sleeve shirt and jeans, standing in front of a blue 'Genie' lift on a paved area beside a fence with privacy screening. An officer's gray-sleeved arm reaches in from the right, and a traffic cone and a 'RESERVED PARKING' sign are visible.
notable_text: Calvin Klein Jeans; Genie; RESERVED PARKING
